meta.title: Welcome & workspace
meta.practicePrompt: Practice Welcome & workspace with verifiable output.

L01.demoMarkdown:
# L01: Welcome & workspace

**Duration:** 5 minutes · **Stream:** lenstemper

## Objectives

- Follow each step with verifiable evidence (screenshot, command output, or file change).
- Stay within this repository and explicitly named demo URLs only.
- Complete the canvas quiz (≥2/3) to mark progress.

## Demo steps

1. Open this repo in Cursor as the workspace root
2. Open `canvases/cursor-training-player.canvas.tsx` beside chat
3. Start the canvas timer on L01 and read the timeline
4. Confirm workspace root — never edit from home directory

## Evidence checklist

- [ ] Step 1 completed
- [ ] Step 2 completed
- [ ] Step 3 completed
- [ ] Step 4 completed

## Cursor practice prompt

> Welcome & workspace: execute the steps above in the practice sandbox. Reply with evidence bullets only.

## Troubleshooting

- **Missing file:** Check `content/practice-sandbox/` paths referenced in meta.demoFiles.
- **Capability missing:** Read the capability banner fallback note and use the manual path.
- **Timer:** Use the canvas timer; pause before switching lessons.

## Related docs

- Catalog: `content/lessons/index.json`
- Phase gates: `docs/PHASES.md`

L18.demoMarkdown:
# L18: Browser automation

**Duration:** 5 minutes · **Stream:** lenstemper

## Objectives

- Follow each step with verifiable evidence (screenshot, command output, or file change).
- Stay within this repository and explicitly named demo URLs only.

4. HANDOFF at 210s for learner control

## Evidence checklist

- [ ] Step 2 completed
- [ ] Step 3 completed

## Cursor practice prompt

> Browser automation: execute the steps above in the practice sandbox. Reply with evidence bullets only.

## Troubleshooting

## Related docs

- Catalog: `content/lessons/index.json`
- Phase gates: `docs/PHASES.md`
L18.assistMarkdown:
# Assist: L18 — Browser automation

## Origin allowlist

Only operate on:

- Paths under this repository (e.g. `content/practice-sandbox/`, `content/lessons/`, `scripts/`)
- `https://example.com` when browser MCP is required (L18 only)
- No other external URLs unless the learner explicitly confirms

## Timeline checkpoints

| atSec | Token | Action |
|------:|-------|--------|
| 0 | START | Confirm prerequisites and read DEMO.md |
| 30 | DEMO | Lead learner through demo steps 1–2 |
| 210 | HANDOFF_TO_LEARNER | Learner drives practice; agent observes |
| 270 | RECAP | Quiz reminders only — do not answer quiz for learner |

## Mode: browser

Use browser MCP only on https://example.com (named demo origin). Snapshot before interactions.

## Manual fallback

If assist is unavailable, learner follows DEMO.md only. Do not mark quiz answers.

## Practice prompt (agent)

Help the learner complete **Browser automation** using sandbox files. Stop at HANDOFF_TO_LEARNER and wait for their practice evidence.

# L39: Privacy modes in production

**Duration:** 5 minutes · **Stream:** lenstemper

## Objectives

- Follow each step with verifiable evidence (screenshot, command output, or file change).
- Stay within this repository and explicitly named demo URLs only.

## Demo steps

1. Privacy mode matrix
2. What leaves device in each mode
3. Team lead export progress JSON
4. Production checklist in DEMO

## Evidence checklist

- [ ] Step 1 completed
- [ ] Step 2 completed
- [ ] Step 3 completed
- [ ] Step 4 completed

## Cursor practice prompt

> Privacy modes in production: execute the steps above in the practice sandbox. Reply with evidence bullets only.

## Troubleshooting

- **Missing file:** Check `content/practice-sandbox/` paths referenced in meta.demoFiles.
- **Capability missing:** Read the capability banner fallback note and use the manual path.
- **Timer:** Use the canvas timer; pause before switching lessons.

## Related docs

- Catalog: `content/lessons/index.json`
- Phase gates: `docs/PHASES.md`

## Team-lead rollout checklist

1. **Export progress JSON** from the training canvas (Export progress JSON button) before org-wide rollout.
2. **Document privacy mode** per repo class (OSS, internal, regulated) using the offline privacy excerpt.
3. **Pin org standards pack** version (rules, skills, hooks) — see L37 sandbox layout.
4. **Pilot cohort:** 3 learners complete L01–L05; collect exported JSON + feedback.
5. **Assist policy:** browser MCP and `gh` are optional; manual DEMO paths must work without them.
6. **Review cadence:** update `docs-pack/manifest.json` `lastReviewed` when canonical docs change.

mcp.title: Model Context Protocol
mcp.attribution: Excerpt for offline training — see canonical URL for latest.
mcp.markdown:
# MCP (training excerpt)

MCP connects Cursor to external tools via configured servers and JSON tool descriptors.

**Canonical:** https://cursor.com/docs/mcp

## Servers and tools

- Enable servers in Cursor Settings → MCP.
- Agents read tool schemas before `CallMcpTool`.
- Auth failures should surface clearly — use manual DEMO path when offline.

## Practice

Map one server to a lesson task and cite the tool name you would call.

hooks.title: Cursor Hooks
hooks.attribution: Excerpt for offline training — see canonical URL for latest.
hooks.markdown:
# Hooks (training excerpt)

Hooks run scripts on agent lifecycle events (prompt submit, tool use, etc.).

**Canonical:** https://cursor.com/docs/hooks

## Safety

- Keep hooks fast and deterministic.
- Never exfiltrate secrets; redact logs.
- Test with sandbox `.cursor/hooks.json` samples.

## Practice

Add a hook that blocks `rm -rf` patterns in training sandbox commands.

sdk-typescript.title: Cursor SDK (TypeScript)
sdk-typescript.attribution: Excerpt for offline training — see canonical URL for latest.
sdk-typescript.markdown:
# Cursor SDK — TypeScript (excerpt)

Programmatic agents via `@cursor/sdk` (package name may vary by release).

**Canonical:** https://cursor.com/docs/sdk/typescript

## Patterns

- **One-shot:** single prompt, collect final message.
- **Session:** `Agent.resume` for multi-turn workflows.

See `content/practice-sandbox/sdk-snippets/hello-agent.ts`.

cloud-agents.title: Cloud Agents API
cloud-agents.attribution: Excerpt for offline training — see canonical URL for latest.
cloud-agents.markdown:
# Cloud Agents API (excerpt)

REST endpoints to create and poll remote agent runs.

**Canonical:** https://cursor.com/docs/cloud-agent/api/endpoints

## Notes

- Use API keys from environment variables.
- Idempotent create with client request IDs.
- Pair with L34 offline demo when network blocked.

privacy.title: Privacy modes
privacy.attribution: Excerpt for offline training — see canonical URL for latest.
privacy.markdown:
# Privacy modes (excerpt)

Controls what code/context leaves the device and retention policies.

**Canonical:** https://cursor.com/docs/account/privacy

## Production checklist (L39)

- Document mode per repo class (OSS, internal, regulated).
- Export progress JSON from the training canvas before audits.
- Pilot L01–L05 with three learners; collect exported JSON.

automations.title: Automations
automations.attribution: Excerpt for offline training — see canonical URL for latest.
automations.markdown:
# Automations (excerpt)

Triggered workflows that launch agents on schedules or events.

**Canonical:** https://cursor.com/docs/automations

## Glass UI

Open Automations from Cursor when available; otherwise write spec in ASSIST/DEMO manual path.

Origin allowlist: repo paths only unless learner confirms an external URL.

browser.title: Browser automation (MCP)
browser.attribution: Excerpt for offline training — see canonical URL for latest.
browser.markdown:
# Browser automation (excerpt)

Cursor-owned browser MCP: navigate, snapshot, interact via accessibility refs.

**Canonical:** https://cursor.com/docs/agent/browser

## Training guardrails

- Lock tab before long automation loops.
- Only automate https://example.com in training unless learner confirms another URL.
- Prefer manual DEMO when browser MCP disabled.
